Interface DRIDesignComponent

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Subinterfaces:
DRIDesignBreak, DRIDesignChart, DRIDesignCrosstab, DRIDesignCustomComponent, DRIDesignEllipse, DRIDesignFiller, DRIDesignGenericElement, DRIDesignHyperLinkComponent, DRIDesignImage, DRIDesignLine, DRIDesignList, DRIDesignRectangle, DRIDesignSubreport, DRIDesignTextField
All Known Implementing Classes:
DRDesignBreak, DRDesignChart, DRDesignComponent, DRDesignCrosstab, DRDesignEllipse, DRDesignFiller, DRDesignGenericElement, DRDesignHyperlinkComponent, DRDesignImage, DRDesignLine, DRDesignList, DRDesignRectangle, DRDesignSubreport, DRDesignTextField
public interface DRIDesignComponent extends Serializable

DRIDesignComponent interface.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
